values: frame drenched in abyssal negative space
composition weighted so black devours the scene
seventy percent of frame swallowed by void
black swallowing edges, only slivers of detail lit
shapes lost to inked shadow, only highlights remain
silhouette carved out of pure black pressure
void pressing in from every corner of the frame
black surrounding the creature like liquid tar
darkness sculpting the form more than light does
void eating away at visible matter
black depths suggesting endless drop below
scene rendered as if light is failing
spotlight barely holding back consuming black
illumination isolated in oceans of shadow
black functioning as the primary subject

creature_features.description: 生物の特徴（古代感・劣化）

values: far enough to see entire creature
close enough to see torso and head
black dominant with blood red accents

cosmic_horror_motifs.description: コズミックホラーの示唆
values: impression of something older than stars
sensation of being watched by the abyss itself
hint of entities moving behind reality's veil
feeling that no gods will intervene
metadata like ancient coordinates etched in flesh
mind recoiling from what it almost recognizes
traces of starless origin across its hide
silence so profound it erases thought
dread that this is only a fragment of something vaster
memory of eons imprinted in skin
feeling reality thins around the body

monochrome_leviathan.text: {artistic_styles} depicting {creature_bases} with {creature_features}. {color_modes} palette and {void_strategies} where {black_symbolism}. {lighting_scenarios} reveals creature at {distance_perspectives}. {water_particles} scatter light creating ethereal effect. {texture_details} visible on ancient hide. {eye_descriptions} meets the viewer with {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {atmospheres} pervades the scene. {movement_qualities} suggests timeless existence. Deep sea setting, no light except artificial source, crushing depth atmosphere. Black dominates as negative space and crushing pressure rather than simple shadow.

chromatic_abyss.description: 黒を基調とした彩色版
chromatic_abyss.text: {artistic_styles} of {creature_bases} bearing {creature_features}. {color_modes} color scheme with black as dominant force where {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {lighting_scenarios} pierces the darkness at {distance_perspectives}. {water_particles} float through beam creating {atmospheres}. {texture_details} enhanced by {eye_descriptions}. {movement_qualities} in the lightless void. Ancient creature thousands of years old, nightmare given form and infused with {cosmic_horror_motifs}. Professional quality, dramatic composition, emotional impact through darkness and sparse color.

intimate_terror.text: Extreme close-up {artistic_styles} showing only portion of {creature_bases}. {distance_perspectives} revealing {creature_features} in unsettling detail. {color_modes} with {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {lighting_scenarios} illuminates {texture_details}. {water_particles} between lens and subject. {eye_descriptions} dominates frame, suggesting {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {atmospheres} through proximity to ancient flesh. {movement_qualities}. Overwhelming scale implied by what extends beyond frame. Cannot see whole creature, only terrifying fragment swallowed by black.

distant_silhouette.text: {artistic_styles} capturing full form of {creature_bases} from {distance_perspectives}. Massive silhouette with {creature_features} visible even at distance. {color_modes} emphasizing {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {lighting_scenarios} barely reaches subject. {water_particles} create depth and atmosphere. {atmospheres} through sheer impossible scale intertwined with {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {movement_qualities}. Creature so large it defines the composition, dwarfing all reference points. {eye_descriptions} somehow visible despite distance. Ancient god-like presence in eternal darkness.

painterly_nightmare.text: {artistic_styles} interpretation of {creature_bases} with {creature_features}. Brushwork emphasizes {texture_details} and {eye_descriptions}. {color_modes} palette where {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {lighting_scenarios} rendered with visible strokes at {distance_perspectives}. {water_particles} as painterly marks. {atmospheres} conveyed through artistic technique and {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {movement_qualities}. Traditional media texture, no digital smoothness, human hand evident in every mark. Nightmare creature from depths of subconscious rendered in classical technique with inescapable void.

documentary_horror.text: Photorealistic {artistic_styles} of {creature_bases} with {creature_features}. Authentic underwater photography aesthetic with {lighting_scenarios}. {color_modes} with natural {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {distance_perspectives} as if captured by research vessel. {water_particles} scatter light realistically. {texture_details} in sharp focus. {eye_descriptions} caught by camera, hinting at {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {atmospheres} of genuine deep sea footage. {movement_qualities}. Looks like actual documentary still of impossible creature. Film grain, lens distortion, authentic underwater optical effects, light barely holding against infinite black.

nightmare_emergence.text: {artistic_styles} of {creature_bases} emerging from absolute darkness. {creature_features} speak to unimaginable age. {color_modes} where {black_symbolism} dominates completely through {void_strategies}. {lighting_scenarios} at {distance_perspectives} creates {atmospheres}. {water_particles} like stars in void. {texture_details} suggests creature older than human memory. {eye_descriptions} holds ancient knowledge and {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {movement_qualities}. Nightmare logic where physics bend around creature's presence. Terror beyond rational comprehension, beauty in the horrific and inescapable black.

abyssal_encounter.text: First contact scene in {artistic_styles} showing {creature_bases} with {creature_features}. {lighting_scenarios} reveals creature at {distance_perspectives} for first time. {color_modes} with {black_symbolism} and {void_strategies}. {water_particles} disturbed by creature's presence. {texture_details} shocking in its alien familiarity. {eye_descriptions} acknowledges observer, implying {cosmic_horror_motifs}. {atmospheres} of forbidden discovery. {movement_qualities}. Moment of mutual awareness between human technology and ancient life. Historical significance of impossible encounter captured in single frame, framed by devouring black.
